Lavish Fête

Triggers: 4 sec

Sacred Spring
The unit casts improved restoration upon self and the allied unit with the lowest current health. The targets have 3 random negative effects removed from each of them. Targets restore 35% health, and all of their stats increase by 20% for 4 sec.

The incoming healing of the artifact's owner and all allied units is increased by 20% for the duration of the battle.

The artifact's owner and all allied units also restore 15% health once every 3 sec.

Requirements: 90-100
